title: Quantum Amplitude Estimation Algorithm
description: Deep dive into the quantum amplitude estimation algorithm, including its connection to phase estimation, the quadratic speedup over classical sampling, and modern variants like iterative and maximum likelihood estimation.
learningObjectives: Understand the mathematical foundation of amplitude estimation
Implement the canonical quantum amplitude estimation algorithm
Analyze the quadratic speedup compared to classical Monte Carlo
Compare different variants: canonical, iterative, and maximum likelihood
Apply amplitude estimation to practical problems
